{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Archlord-level natural treasures
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord-level natural treasures]] can be used to advance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
